name: sharp
summary: High performance Node.js image processing, the fastest module to resize JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, AVIF and TIFF images

story.problem:
The typical use case for this high speed Node-API module
is to convert large images in common formats to
smaller, web-friendly JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF and AVIF images of varying dimensions.

It can be used with all JavaScript runtimes
that provide support for Node-API v9, including
Node.js (^18.17.0 or >= 20.3.0), Deno and Bun.

Resizing an image is typically 4x-5x faster than using the
quickest ImageMagick and GraphicsMagick settings
due to its use of libvips.

Colour spaces, embedded ICC…
story.when_to_use:
``sh
npm install sharp
`

`javascript
const sharp = require('sharp');
``

nodes.label: sharp
nodes.summary: Top-level module. Import as `import sharp` or `from sharp import ...`
